views.name: TodayView
views.purpose: Primary daily view. At the top, a large circular budget ring showing remaining daily budget — green when under 60%, yellow 60-90%, red above 90%. Below it, today's total and remaining amount as prominent text. Then a chronological list of today's expenses, each row showing category icon, note, and amount. Empty state shows a friendly illustration encouraging the first entry of the day.

views.name: BreakdownView
views.purpose: Monthly category breakdown. A month picker at top for navigation. Below it, horizontal bar chart showing each category's spending as a proportional bar with the category icon, name, total amount, and percentage. Bars are colored by category. Sorted by amount descending. At the bottom, monthly total and average daily spend for that month. Tapping a category could expand to show individual transactions.

views.name: TrendsView
views.purpose: Weekly and long-term spending trends. A 7-day bar chart showing daily spending for the current week with the daily budget as a dashed reference line. Below it, week-over-week comparison (e.g., '12% less than last week' in green or '8% more' in red). Then a streak badge showing current under-budget streak with flame icon. Finally, a list of 2-3 auto-generated insight cards (top category, biggest expense, no-spend days).

views.name: ExpenseEntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick expense entry modal optimized for speed. Large amount input at top with prominent font and currency symbol, auto-focused on appear. Below it, a 3x3 grid of category buttons (icon + label) for single-tap selection with the selected one highlighted in hubPrimary. Optional note field at the bottom. Save button is large and prominent. Entire flow should take under 5 seconds for a typical entry.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries from today sorted by most recent first

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all amounts spent today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyBudgetRemaining
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily budget minus today's total, floored at 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyBudgetProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayTotal / dailyBudget capped at 1.0 — drives the budget ring fill

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentMonthTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all spending in the selected month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Selected month's spending grouped by category, sorted descending by total, with percentage of month total

viewModelComputedProperties.name: thisWeekDailyTotals
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 7 daily totals for current week Mon-Sun, 0 for future days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: thisWeekTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of spending for Mon through today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: lastWeekTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total spending for previous Mon-Sun week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDailySpend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean daily spending over last 30 days with data

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days ending today where daily total <= daily budget

viewModelComputedProperties.name: noSpendDaysThisMonth
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of days this month with zero spending (past days only)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topCategoryThisMonth
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Category with highest total spending this month

dailyGoal.description: Daily spending budget the user aims to stay under. Shown as the budget ring target.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the under-budget streak if that day's total spending is less than or equal to the daily budget goal. Days with zero spending count. The streak breaks when any day's total exceeds the budget. Only completed days (before today) plus today (if currently under) are counted.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary: week-over-week total spending comparison. Secondary: 30-day rolling average daily spend. Category-level: identify which category had the largest absolute increase compared to same period last month. Daily budget adherence rate (% of days under budget in last 30 days).
insights: Today's budget status with remaining amount or overage
Week-over-week spending change with percentage and direction
Top spending category this month with its share percentage
Number of no-spend days this month as a positive reinforcement metric
Biggest single expense this week with category and amount
Category with largest month-over-month increase as a spending alert
Budget adherence rate over last 30 days as a percentage
